name: Multiple Data Augmentation Strategies for Improving Performance on Automatic Short Answer Scoring
venue: Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence
summary: Pre-GPT automatic short-answer scoring study using multiple augmentation strategies, including back-translation, correct student answers as additional references, and column-swapping variants, to supplement limited SciEntsBank/SemEval training data.

access_attempts.result: Full-text PDF downloaded and text extracted.
access_attempts.notes: Sections reviewed: abstract, Multiple Data Augmentation Strategies, Experiments/Dataset, Tables 2-4, Conclusion and Future Work.

access_attempts.result: Crossref metadata verified DOI, authors, venue, and publication date.
